description: Hybrid — ECDSA auth + ECDH + ML-KEM-768 key exchange + combine_kdf + PQ-TLS transport

oracle.description: Dolev-Yao attacker with break_dh quantum oracle
oracle.channel_model: Both ch and ch_tls are public — attacker has full Dolev-Yao control over all channels

oracle_analysis.oracle_blocked_by: combine_kdf(shS_ecdh, shS_mlkem) — attacker recovers shS_ecdh via break_dh but cannot evaluate combine_kdf without shS_mlkem
oracle_analysis.interpretation: HNDL-resistant: diagnostic confirms oracle fired (QD=FALSE), but Q5/Q6 remain TRUE because combine_kdf blocks completion. The ML-KEM component (shS_mlkem) is unrecoverable without otSK.EUICC.MLKEM

attack_traces.QD: Attacker applies break_dh(dhpk(otSK_dp_ecka), dhpk(otSK_euicc_ecka)) to recover shS_ecdh, proving oracle is active

pfs.description: Phase-separated PFS test: single session, signing keys revealed in phase 1, no break_dh
